description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a natural light wood finish and a black knob at the handle end. The lower barrel of the bat is stained with a vivid red color, suggesting either paint or a graphic effect. The bat features a visible brand logo and text running vertically along the upper barrel, rendered in a dark color for contrast. The handle appears smooth and lacks any grip tape, maintaining the natural wood texture. The end cap is a simple, flat, black disc, distinct from the rest of the bat. The overall design is classic, with a slightly tapered handle and a rounded barrel, suitable for use in urban sports or as a prop.
description: A natural wood baseball bat with a black knob, red-stained barrel, and visible branding. The handle is smooth and lacks grip tape, while the end cap is flat and black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bat, with the black knob at the top and the red-stained barrel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the vertical brand text and the transition from natural wood to the red-stained barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the bat, with the branding and red stain still visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the other direction, again showing the black knob, smooth handle, and red-stained barrel.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark-colored logo and text are visible on the upper barrel, vertically oriented, medium size, and contrasting with the light wood.
attribute_barrel_markings: Vertical brand name and logo in dark color on the upper barrel, clear and bold lettering.
attribute_end_cap_design: Flat, circular, black end cap made of plastic, smooth texture, no visible logos or markings.
